roleSelection.title: How would you like to use Fixam?
roleSelection.subtitle: Choose how you want to join. You can add another account type later.
roleSelection.workDesc: Grow your business and find local service tasks to complete.

onboarding.slide1Desc:
Connect with the best professionals
in your neighborhood for any task.
onboarding.slide2Desc:
All service providers are verified
and reviewed by the community.
onboarding.slide3Desc:
Fixam connects you with trusted local pros.
After the job is complete, you pay them directly.

login.subtitle: Sign in to continue with professional services in your area.

register.subtitle: Set up your Fixam account details.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 number.
register.termsRequired: Please accept the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy before creating your account.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address or phone number and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.alertBody: This feature is currently not fully configured on the backend. A reset link would normally be sent.
forgotPassword.alertError: Please enter your email or phone number.

permissions.locationTitle: Allow Fixam to use your location?
permissions.locationText: We use your location to show nearby tasks, providers, arrival estimates, and better local matches.
permissions.notificationText: We use notifications for new messages, job requests, status changes, reminders, and safety updates.
permissions.safetyTextClient: Check the verification badge, reviews, ratings, and task details before accepting a provider.
permissions.safetyTextProvider: Keep your profile accurate and communicate inside Fixam so clients can trust your work.
permissions.paymentText: Fixam connects clients and providers. After the work, payment is handled directly.

settings.profileDesc: View and edit your public profile
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and app preferences

profile.coinDeducted: will be deducted from your wallet
profile.bookingDescription: Booking this provider will unlock direct messaging and allow you to coordinate the service.

profile.bookingFailed: Failed to book provider. Please try again.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Tell us what to improve or what is not working well.

providerSetup.subtitle: Add the details clients need before they can trust and hire you.
providerSetup.experiencePlaceholder: Example: 5 years repairing home electrical systems
providerSetup.bioPlaceholder: Tell clients what you do best and how you work.

bookings.title: Book Service
bookings.sentBody: The provider will see this under My Jobs > Bookings.

payments.paymentInstructions: You will receive a prompt to confirm the payment for {{price}}.
payments.submitPaymentFailed: Payment submission failed. Please try again.

tour.welcomeProviderBody: Your Fixam provider account is live. Top up your wallet, turn on your availability, and start applying for tasks near you. Clients are already posting jobs — let's get you your first one.
tour.welcomeClientBody: Your account is ready. Post your first task in seconds, browse verified local professionals near you, and pay only after the job is done. Let's show you around.
tour.providerTopUpText: You need coins to apply for tasks. Tap Top Up to add coins via MTN MoMo or Orange Money.
tour.providerOnlineText: Toggle this switch to Online — clients nearby can only see and request you when you're online.
tour.providerFindJobsText: Tap Find Jobs here to browse all open tasks near you and apply with one tap.
tour.providerViewAllText: Scroll down to see real tasks posted by clients near you right now. Tap Apply to send your offer.
tour.clientPostText: Tap this button to describe what you need, set your budget and location. Providers near you will respond fast.
tour.clientTopUpText: Add coins to book providers and unlock direct messaging. MTN MoMo and Orange Money accepted.
tour.clientBrowseText: Tap View All to see all verified providers near you. Filter by skill, rating, and availability.
tour.clientMyTasksText: Tap My Tasks here to see the live status of every job you've posted — from open to completed.

errors.registrationFailed: Failed to complete registration. Please try again.

deleteAccount.warning1: All your personal data will be permanently deleted
deleteAccount.warning2: Your active bookings will be cancelled
deleteAccount.warning3: Your wallet balance will be lost
deleteAccount.warning4: You will not be able to recover your account
deleteAccount.confirmSubtitle: Enter your password to confirm account deletion

guide.reviewText: Rate your experience to help the community.

legal.title: Terms & Privacy Policy

termsSections.title: 1. Introduction and Acceptance of Terms
termsSections.body: Welcome to Fixam. By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Fixam mobile application and related services (collectively, the 'Platform'), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Fixam connects clients needing diverse services with professional, vetted service providers in Cameroon. If you do not agree to all of these terms and conditions, you must not use our Platform.

termsSections.title: 2. Eligibility and Account Registration
termsSections.body: To use Fixam, you must be at least 18 years of age and capable of forming a binding contract. When registering, whether as a Client or a Provider, you must provide accurate, complete, and current information. You are solely responsible for safeguarding your login credentials (including OTPs) and for all activities that occur under your account. Fixam reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that provide false information or violate our community guidelines.

termsSections.title: 3. The Role of the Fixam Platform
termsSections.body: Fixam acts exclusively as a technological marketplace connecting independent service providers with clients. We do not directly employ the providers, nor do we act as an agent for either party. While we strive to verify providers and maintain high standards, we do not guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of the services performed. Any disputes arising from the provision of services must be resolved directly between the client and the provider, although Fixam may, at its discretion, offer mediation support.

termsSections.title: 4. Booking, Payments, and Fixam Coins
termsSections.body: Booking a provider on Fixam requires the use of Fixam coins, our in-app currency. Coins are purchased through the application and are non-refundable unless a booking is cancelled under conditions explicitly outlined in our Cancellation Policy. Providers independently set their service rates, and clients agree to pay the agreed-upon amount directly to the provider upon satisfactory completion of the service. Fixam is not responsible for off-platform financial transactions or disputes over payment amounts between users.

termsSections.title: 5. Code of Conduct and Prohibited Activities
termsSections.body: All users must treat each other with utmost respect and professionalism. Harassment, discrimination, fraud, sharing inappropriate content, and any unprofessional behavior are strictly prohibited. You may not use the Platform for any illegal activities or to solicit services that violate local laws. Violations will result in immediate account termination and potential legal action.

termsSections.title: 6. Intellectual Property Rights
termsSections.body: All content on the Fixam Platform, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of Fixam or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not modify, copy, distribute, or reverse engineer any part of the Platform without our explicit written consent.

termsSections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability and Indemnification
termsSections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Fixam shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, arising from your use of the Platform. You agree to indemnify and hold Fixam harmless from any claims, losses, or damages arising out of your breach of these Terms or your interactions with other users.

termsSections.title: 8. Modifications to Terms
termsSections.body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of any significant changes by updating the 'Last Updated' date or through direct communication. Continued use of the Platform after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.

privacySections.title: 1. Information We Collect
privacySections.body: We collect personal information that you provide directly to us when you register and use the Platform. This includes your full name, phone number, email address, physical location, date of birth, profile picture, and service preferences. For providers, we also collect professional skills, portfolios, identification documents, and availability data. We also collect usage data and device information automatically as you interact with the app.

privacySections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
privacySections.body: Your information is primarily used to provide, maintain, and improve the Fixam platform. Specifically, we use your location to connect you with nearby providers or clients, your contact information to send transactional messages (like OTPs and booking updates), and your profile data to personalize your experience. We also use aggregated data for analytics and to improve our service offerings.

privacySections.title: 3. Information Sharing and Disclosure
privacySections.body: To facilitate service bookings, we share relevant information between clients and providers (e.g., location, name, phone number, and service details). We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes. We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating the app, or with legal authorities if required by law or to protect our rights and the safety of our users.

privacySections.title: 4. Data Security and Retention
privacySections.body: We implement industry-standard security measures, including encryption and secure socket layers (SSL), to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. We retain your data only for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services, comply with legal obligations, and resolve disputes.

privacySections.title: 5. Your Privacy Rights and Choices
privacySections.body: You have the right to access, update, correct, or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings. You may also opt-out of promotional communications, although you will continue to receive essential transactional messages. If you wish to completely delete your account and associated data, you may do so within the app or by contacting our support team.

privacySections.title: 6. Changes to This Privacy Policy
privacySections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. We will notify you of any material changes via the app or email. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your privacy.

legal.contact: If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback regarding these terms or our privacy practices, please contact us at support@fixam.com.
